findings.description: The Kentucky death record indexed under name variants (Elizah/Eligie/Eligah Wilkins) is attached as the source for the death fact, and the agent notes the identity is confirmed by matching tree context rather than by name spelling alone: an age consistent with an 1814 birth, and family details matching spouse Sally Wilkins (K2BS-YMD) and parents James Wilkins (KD7X-7WB) and Margaret Elizabeth Jarvis (2W9K-4M8) — distinguishing this Elijah from several same-surname relatives in the same Muhlenberg County tree.
